chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P.No.D-2143 of 2025 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1.For orders on office objection. 2.For hearing of main case. 13.10.2025 Mr.Abid Hussain Junejo, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.S. Bashir Hussain Shah, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Ameen Ahmed, Assistant Director Regional Passport Office, Saddar Karachi is present. --- The officer present in Court on behalf of Directorate General of Immigration and Passports invites attention to the comments filed in the matter and submits that the petitioner has a remedy before the Director General of Immigration and Passports for seeking removal of his name from P.C.L. (Passport Control List). He undertakes that if any application/representation is made by the petitioner in that regard before the competent authority, the same would be dealt with in accordance with law without any undue delay and disposed of through speaking order after hearing the petitioner within a period of 30 days. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied in that regard and submits that the petitioner would act accordingly. In view of the foregoing, the petition is disposed of in such terms. Judge Judge nasir
